revision.comment: Starting out this template. More to be done.
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

To avoid any disruptions and to save server load, any changes should first be tested in this template's [[{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|/sandbox]] or [[{{BASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|/testcases]] subpage, or in your own [[Special:Mypage/Test1|user space]]. The tested changes can then be added in one single edit to this template. As a courtesy to other users, please discuss any changes at {{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[{{{2}}}]]|the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]}} before implementing them. }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text:
{{ombox | type = content | text = '''This template is used on [[Special:MostLinkedTemplates|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|many}} pages]].'''
To avoid any disruptions and to save some server load, any changes should first be tested in this template's [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|/sandbox]] or [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|/testcases]] subpage, or in your own [[Wikipedia:Sub-pages#How to create user subpages|user space]]. The tested changes can then be added in one single edit to this template. As a courtesy to other users, please discuss any changes at {{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[{{{2}}}]]|the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]}} before implementing them. }} {{Documentation}}

Namespace number
Lua detection
chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
rv gf--I think the use on the doc page is sufficient
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted most of Thumperward's edit, to last version by Ms2ger. See discussion on talk page.
revision.text:
{{ombox | type = content | text = '''This template is used on [[Special:MostLinkedTemplates|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|many}} pages]].'''
To avoid any disruptions and to save some server load, any changes should first be tested in this template's [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/sandbox|/sandbox]] or [[{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}/testcases|/testcases]] subpage, or in your own [[Wikipedia:Sub-pages#How to create user subpages|user space]]. The tested changes can then be added in one single edit to this template. As a courtesy to other users, please discuss any changes at {{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[{{{2}}}]]|the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]}} before implementing them. }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: make this work properly on sandbox pages

Namespace number
Lua detection
chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Eyesnore|Eyesnore]] ([[User talk:Eyesnore|talk]]) to last version by Obsuser
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
remove good faith although undiscussed changes
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/TheDragonFire|TheDragonFire]] ([[User talk:TheDragonFire|talk]]) to last version by Pppery
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 May 5#Template:High-risk]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:35:52 on [[Template:High-use]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: make this work properly on sandbox pages
Changing to WMF labs, db report is stale
Namespace number
Lua detection
chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
rv gf--I think the use on the doc page is sufficient
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/TheDragonFire|TheDragonFire]] ([[User talk:TheDragonFire|talk]]) to last version by Pppery
[[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2018 May 5#Template:High-risk]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: make this work properly on sandbox pages
Changed protection level of Template:High-use: not high-risk; requested at RfPP ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite))
Changing to WMF labs, db report is stale
Namespace number
Lua detection
chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
rv gf--I think the use on the doc page is sufficient
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
Why ?
remove good faith although undiscussed changes
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:36:52 on [[Template:High-use]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: make this work properly on sandbox pages
Changing to WMF labs, db report is stale
Namespace number
Lua detection
chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Eyesnore|Eyesnore]] ([[User talk:Eyesnore|talk]]) to last version by Obsuser
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
remove good faith although undiscussed changes
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:38:05 on [[Template:High-use]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

make the switch statement actually do something
"so"
Since the server(s) support [[HTTPS]], use [[protocol relative URL]](s) (i.e. without http:) for these website(s): tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/
better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)
Undid revision 699516804 by [[Special:Contributions/Obsuser|Obsuser]] ([[User talk:Obsuser|talk]]) this is English Wikipedia, not [[sr:]]
sorry, didn’t change language but copy-pasted link as it is
second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
rv gf--I think the use on the doc page is sufficient
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
update
added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image
Tfd tag
Use toollabs interwiki code instead of an external link.
merge {{high-risk}}, copy from [[template:high-risk/sandbox]], see its history for attribution (some code by Ppperry)
+all-pages
better handling o input
fix
better handling of +
fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
Use [[Module:High-use]]

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:40:53 on [[Template:High-use]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:45:32 on [[Template:High-use]]
revision.text:
[[Image:Ambox content.png|40x40px]] '''This template is used on many pages.'''
To avoid unnecessary disturbances and save server load any changes should first be tried in this template's [[/sandbox]] or [[/testcases]] or in your own user space. Then the tested changes can be added in one single edit to this template. But please first discuss your suggested changes at the [[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]].
{{Documentation}}

Namespace number

chg to pagename
make the switch statement actually do something
"so"

better icon
formatnum
disambiguating module and template, and other corrections
use TLS, available since at least fall 2013 (see also: "01:08, 12 January 2016‎ BeebLee (talk | contribs)‎" on Template:High-risk: Revision history)

second param - at <talk page>, not on <talk page>
rv gf--I think the use on the doc page is sufficient
number of transclusions rounded to 2sf as discussed on talk
noinclude must follow "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
remove good faith although undiscussed changes

added equivalent alt text "Warning" to image

+all-pages
better handling o input
fix

fix
add option so notice can be used as an edit notice
